user.title: Thailand Petrol Prices
user.description: Add the Thailand Petrol Prices integration to monitor live fuel prices from motorist.co.th for Bangkok and surrounding provinces.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Thailand Petrol Prices can be configured.

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch fresh prices. Minimum 300 s (5 min), maximum 86400 s (24 h). Default: 3600 (1 h).
